title: Linear Programming and Constrained Optimization · Worked Case: Graphical Linear Programming
summary: Choose a fair production and distribution plan under limited resources. Planned artifact: Add and verify the math int graphical linear programming increment in an explainable constrained optimization model. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Solve two-variable linear programs graphically and verify corner candidates.
Define decision variables, objective, constraints, units, and feasible domain.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""applied-mathematics-intermediate cumulative model portfolio."""

from math import exp, log, sqrt


def reasonableness(value: float, lower: float, upper: float) -> bool:
    return lower <= value <= upper
